verses.text: Topa phat un. Lungsim thutangte a omna, mihon kikhopna sungah ka lungsim khempeuh tawh Topa' tungah lungdamna ka ko ding hi
Topa' nasepna lian a, hoih a sa mi khempeuh in tuate kankan uh hi
Ama nasepnate, pahtawina leh minliatna tawh kidim a, ama thumanna kip tawntung hi
Amah in phawk tawntung dingin a lamdang nasepnate hong bawl a, Topa dikin hehpihna nei hi
Amah in amah a zahtakte an pia a, a thuciamna a phawk tawntung hi
Amah in ama mite tungah minamte' gamh a piakna tawh ama vangliatna hong lak khin hi
Ama nasepnate khempeuhah amah thumanin citak a, a thupiaknate muan'taak mahmah hi
A tawntungin tuate kip ngitnget a, thuman leh thutang tawh zuih ding ahi hi
Amah in ama mite honkhia a, a tawntunga kimang dingin thupiakna a bawl khin hi. Ama min siangtho-in vanglian mahmah hi
Topa zahtakna pen pilna kipatna ahi hi. Ama thupiak a zuite khempeuh tungah thukhen siamna a pia hi. Amah phat tawntung ding ahi hi.
